title: Persuasion Techniques in Memes
description: Detection and classification of persuasion techniques in memes, requiring annotators to identify rhetorical and propaganda techniques in meme text and highlight persuasive spans. Based on SemEval-2024 Task 4.

    year = "2024",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics"
